item.description: <p><a class="footer" href="/" alt="Home"><i class="fa-solid fa-house"></i></a> <a class="footer" href="/poploser/" alt="Pop Loser"><i class="fa-solid fa-skull" style="color: #EA1889;"></i></a> <a class="footer" href="/terrypunchout/" alt="Searching for Terry Punchout"><i class="fa-solid fa-book-open"></i></a> <a class="footer" href="/writing/" alt="Some Writing"><i class="fa-solid fa-paragraph"></i></a> <a class="footer" href="/mixtapes/" alt="Mixtapes"><i class="fa-solid fa-radio"></i></a> <a class="footer" href="/info/" alt="More Info"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-info"></i></a> <a class="footer" href="/photos/" alt="Photos"><i class="fa-solid fa-camera-retro"></i></a> <a class="footer" href="/tarcade/" alt="Arcade Scores"><i class="fa-solid fa-ghost"></i></a> <a class="footer" href="https://mstdn.ca/@poploser" alt="Follow Me on Mastodon"><i class="fa-brands fa-mastodon" style="color: #563ACC;"></i> <a class="footer" href="https://bsky.app/profile/tylerhellard.com" alt="Follow Me on Bluesky"><i class="fa-brands fa-bluesky" style="color: #87CEEB; margin: 0;"></i></a> <a class="footer" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/tylerhellard/" alt="I’d like to add you to my professional network on LinkedIn"><i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin" style="color: #0072b1; margin: 0;"></i></a> <a class="footer" href="mailto:tylerc@spincity.org" alt="Email Me"><i class="fa-solid fa-envelope" style="color: #222; margin: 0;"></i></a> <a class="footer" href="https://tylerhellard.com/feed.xml" alt="RSS Feed"><i class="fa-solid fa-rss" style="color: #FE5C00; margin: 0;"></i></a></p>
